test.create_query: CREATE TABLE query_plan_cache_perf ( id UInt64, s String, d Date ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO query_plan_cache_perf VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse query plan cache benchmark', '2024-01-01')
test.query: SELECT id, id + 1 AS id_1, id + 2 AS id_2, id + 3 AS id_3, id + 4 AS id_4, id + 5 AS id_5, id + 6 AS id_6, id + 7 AS id_7, id + 8 AS id_8, id + 9 AS id_9, id + 10 AS id_10, id + 11 AS id_11, id + 12 AS id_12, id + 13 AS id_13, id + 14 AS id_14, id + 15 AS id_15, id + 16 AS id_16, id + 17 AS id_17, id + 18 AS id_18, id + 19 AS id_19, id + 20 AS id_20, id + 21 AS id_21, id + 22 AS id_22, id + 23 AS id_23, id + 24 AS id_24, id + 25 AS id_25, id + 26 AS id_26, id + 27 AS id_27, id + 28 AS id_28, id + 29 AS id_29, id + 30 AS id_30, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 1)) AS s_1, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 2)) AS s_2, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 3)) AS s_3, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 4)) AS s_4, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 5)) AS s_5, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 6)) AS s_6, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 7)) AS s_7, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 8)) AS s_8, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 9)) AS s_9, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 10)) AS s_10, toYear(d) AS y, toMonth(d) AS m, toDayOfMonth(d) AS dom FROM query_plan_cache_perf WHERE id = 1 FORMAT Null SETTINGS allow_experimental_analyzer = 1, max_threads = 1

SELECT id, id + 1 AS id_1, id + 2 AS id_2, id + 3 AS id_3, id + 4 AS id_4, id + 5 AS id_5, id + 6 AS id_6, id + 7 AS id_7, id + 8 AS id_8, id + 9 AS id_9, id + 10 AS id_10, id + 11 AS id_11, id + 12 AS id_12, id + 13 AS id_13, id + 14 AS id_14, id + 15 AS id_15, id + 16 AS id_16, id + 17 AS id_17, id + 18 AS id_18, id + 19 AS id_19, id + 20 AS id_20, id + 21 AS id_21, id + 22 AS id_22, id + 23 AS id_23, id + 24 AS id_24, id + 25 AS id_25, id + 26 AS id_26, id + 27 AS id_27, id + 28 AS id_28, id + 29 AS id_29, id + 30 AS id_30, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 1)) AS s_1, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 2)) AS s_2, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 3)) AS s_3, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 4)) AS s_4, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 5)) AS s_5, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 6)) AS s_6, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 7)) AS s_7, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 8)) AS s_8, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 9)) AS s_9, concat(s, ':', toString(id + 10)) AS s_10, toYear(d) AS y, toMonth(d) AS m, toDayOfMonth(d) AS dom FROM query_plan_cache_perf WHERE id = 1 FORMAT Null SETTINGS allow_experimental_analyzer = 1, allow_experimental_query_plan_cache = 1, enable_query_plan_cache = 1, max_threads = 1
